title: Plus Account Dual-Use (Web+Codex)
subtitle: Use on both Web and Codex! CPA, SUB, codex requires code verification. Full quota, stock accounts.
warnings: ⚠️ Warranty: Only quota is guaranteed, dates are not guaranteed. Approx 1-15 days, 5 days cooling period after expiration.
⚠️ Please read carefully: No refunds due to the nature of the product. Test one first before bulk buying.
deliveryNotice: Delivery: Format is email-url. Enter email to login, then visit the URL to get verification code. If not received, resend and refresh. Chrome recommended.
features: Usable on both Web and Codex platforms
Full quota stock accounts, instant delivery
Get login code via URL yourself
